name: Reduced Calorie Parmesan Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Place the fat-free ranch dressing in a shallow bowl.
In another shallow bowl, mix together the bread crumbs, fat-free parmesan cheese,
and optional Italian seasoning. Roll each chicken breast (one at a time) in
the fat-free dressing and then in the breadcrumb mixture. Place on a greased
baking sheet. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes or until cooked through. Note: You may
need to adjust measurements depending on the size of the chicken breasts.
